name: Strawberry Heaven
recipeIngredient: 3 1/4 cups thawed fat-free cool whip topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake horizontally into three equal layers.
2. Place one layer on a serving plate.
3. Spread one-fourth cup of the fruit spread on the first cake layer.
4. Top with half a cup of whipped topping.
5. Repeat layers, finishing with the top layer of cake.
6. Frost the top and sides of the cake with the remaining whipped topping.
7. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until ready to serve.
8. Decorate the top and sides of the cake with strawberry slices and mint leaves.
9. Store leftover cake in the refrigerator.
Makes 12 servings.
